title: Create Prismarine Automation
description: Automate Copper and lapis with a guardian farm and a touch of that Create Mod magic.
body:
This mod adds some useful recipes to make building a **guardian farm** in a Create Mod survival playthrough **worth the while**.
> Create Prismarine Automation focuses on adding recipes based on **Minecraft Create Mod's crafting cystems**, making some of the most **important materials renawable**.

Namely **automate copper and lapis** with your new and improved monumental farm.

Recipes added by Create Prismarine Automation:  
<details>
<summary>Crushing Prismarine blocks for a chance of getting you some nuggets of experience and lapis</summary>
  
![Crush Prismarine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29242467434d09dbf295e8cf8c3dc9d96af1a4a5.png)
  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Crushing prismarine bricks for some more experience nuggets, as well as some copper</summary>
  
![Crush Prismarine Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa74d68e7d0a375f24126ef65b21c36e7ed979a4.png)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Smelting prismarine blocks into veridium</summary>
  
![Smelt Prismarine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eec851b6f6b29634a552a817568d74045ef6fd0.png)

</details>
